codeReview.summary: The early implementation in commit 0467f1d correctly flips duplicate wire literals to snake_case across Rust and frontend: ResultType now serializes with `#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]`, frontend `CompareResultType` includes `duplicate_file_a`/`duplicate_file_b`, and result presentation/tests were updated to the new literals. I found no blocking or non-blocking correctness defects in the reviewed diff for this feature scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature traceability is incomplete for this completed item: `features.json` marks the feature completed but leaves worker-session linkage empty, so review evidence has to be reconstructed from free-text description + unrelated feature handoff.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission features entry at features.json lines ~700-727 shows `status: "completed"` with `workerSessionIds: []`, while the description says it was completed in commit `0467f1d`; matching handoff is `handoffs/2026-04-17T23-55-08-733Z__m2-axum-0.8-upgrade__111c85f9-3599-4186-b917-5333c408d63a.json` lines 3-6.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture documentation is out of sync with the implemented type naming for this contract area (`ResultKind` in docs vs `ResultType` in code), which can mislead future workers and reviewers for duplicate wire-literal tasks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md lines 43, 55, and 109 describe `ResultKind` as the wire-contract enum, but src/data/types.rs line 137 defines `pub enum ResultType` with snake_case serde.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The recovered handoff tied to this early implementation did not capture the feature's intended compare-response UI assertion (it only confirmed upload endpoints), suggesting a gap between expected wire-contract UI verification and practical agent-browser procedure for this flow.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff `...m2-axum-0.8-upgrade...json` lines 61-93 show interactive checks limited to `/files/a` and `/files/b` plus a discovered issue stating agent-browser could not reliably drive the compare button.

summary: Pass. The duplicate literal rename to `duplicate_file_a`/`duplicate_file_b` is correctly implemented across Rust serialization and frontend wire typing/presentation in commit 0467f1d, with no code-level defects found for this feature.
